mapper.select: SELECT h.id, h.name, h.detail, h.cover, h.covers, h.area_id, h.community_id, h.sized_id, h.type_id, h.size_number, h.direction_id, h.fitment_status_id, h.rent, h.deposit_method_id, h.is_subway, h.floor, h.subway_line, h.living_facilities, h.rental_type, h.status, h.create_time, IFNULL(c.name, '未选小区') AS community_name, a.parent_id AS top_area_id, a.name AS city_area_name, l.id AS landlord_id, u.username AS landlord_name, u.avatar AS landlord_avatar FROM house h LEFT JOIN community c ON c.id = h.community_id LEFT JOIN area a ON a.id = h.area_id LEFT JOIN landlord l ON l.id = h.landlord_id LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = l.user_id WHERE h.id = #{id}
SELECT h.id, h.create_time FROM house h WHERE h.create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

SELECT CASE city_name WHEN '上海' THEN '上海市' WHEN '北京' THEN '北京市' WHEN '天津' THEN '天津市' WHEN '重庆' THEN '重庆市' ELSE city_name END AS name, COUNT(h.id) AS count FROM house h LEFT JOIN area a ON a.id = h.area_id LEFT JOIN area p ON p.id = a.parent_id LEFT JOIN area gp ON gp.id = p.parent_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT h1.id, CASE WHEN a1.id IS NULL OR a1.name IS NULL OR TRIM(a1.name) = '' THEN '未设置地区' WHEN p1.id IS NULL THEN a1.name WHEN p1.parent_id = 0 THEN a1.name WHEN gp1.id IS NULL THEN p1.name WHEN gp1.parent_id = 0 THEN p1.name ELSE a1.name END AS city_name FROM house h1 LEFT JOIN area a1 ON a1.id = h1.area_id LEFT JOIN area p1 ON p1.id = a1.parent_id LEFT JOIN area gp1 ON gp1.id = p1.parent_id ) city_scope ON city_scope.id = h.id WHERE h.status = 1 GROUP BY name ORDER BY COUNT(h.id) DESC, name ASC LIMIT #{limitCount}
